# Rust Bindings

This directory contains the Rust bindings for Przetak.

There are two crates:

* `przetak` — safe, high-level Rust bindings (recommended for most users)
* `przetak-sys` — unsafe, low-level bindings generated by `bindgen`

In most cases you should depend on `przetak`.

## Prerequisites

Before using the Rust crate, ensure the shared library (`libprzetak.so`,
`libprzetak.dylib`, or `przetak.dll`) is in a directory listed in your
system's library search path.

### Linux

Either set `LD_LIBRARY_PATH`:

```
$ export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/path/to/przetak:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH
```

Or install the library to a standard location and update the linker cache:

```
$ sudo cp libprzetak.so /usr/local/lib/
$ sudo ldconfig
```

### macOS

Use `DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH` or install the dylib to a standard location.

### Windows

Ensure the directory containing `przetak.dll` is in your `PATH`.

## Usage

Add `przetak` as a dependency in your `Cargo.toml`:

```toml
[dependencies]
przetak = { git = "https://github.com/MarcinCiura/przetak", branch = "master", subdirectory = "rust/przetak" }
```
